children.heading: General authority
children.label: a General authority
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this section, the Secretary is authorized to acquire lands and interest therein within the boundaries of the historical park by donation, purchase with donated or appropriated funds, or exchange.

children.heading: State and local properties
children.label: b State and local properties
children.text: Lands and interests therein that are owned by the State of Louisiana, or any political subdivision thereof, may be acquired only by donation or exchange.

children.heading: Museum Contents, Inc.
children.label: c Museum Contents, Inc.
children.text: Lands and structures identified in may be acquired only by donation.section 410ccc–1(b)(2) of this title

children.heading: Cooperative agreement sites
children.label: d Cooperative agreement sites
children.text: Lands and interests therein that are the subject of cooperative agreements pursuant to shall not be acquired except with the consent of the owner thereof.section 410ccc–1(b)(3) of this title
